data.content:
1. Acceptance criterion 4 is not met: knot head/index payload writers still pass step_metadata: None and next_step_metadata: None in the create, update, and state-transition code paths, so persisted knot-head log payloads never carry the new metadata.
2. Acceptance criterion 5 is not met: there are no downstream documentation updates; README.md and CONTRIBUTING.md contain no references to step_metadata, next_step_metadata, or review_hint.
3. Acceptance criterion 6 is not met: the new tests exercise step_metadata_for_state directly instead of asserting the metadata on knot responses or persisted payloads across three workflow patterns.
